unifiedImport.action.filesOnDisk.shorthe: Opens a file selection browser and lets you select the required file.
unifiedImport.action.folderOnDisk.shorth: Opens a folder selection browser and lets you select a folder containing the required file only.
unifiedImport.action.allowedContent1: You can choose content for import from multiple sources
unifiedImport.action.allowedContent2: Choose files or directories from your system using Browse buttons, or simply drag and drop them.
unifiedImport.action.allowedContent3: Drop documents from widgets like Document Management, 3DSearch, 3DSpace, Product Structure Editor..
unifiedImport.action.allowedContent4: Drop documents or bookmarks containing documents from Bookmark Editor.
unifiedImport.action.allowedContent5: Drop files or folders containing files directly from 3DDrive.
unifiedImport.content.accordion.title: Files
unifiedImport.content.hideProcess: Expand the widget to see more content
unifiedImport.content.potentialmethods.p: Select an import method to begin the import
unifiedImport.options.bookmark.label: Bookmark
unifiedImport.options.collaborativespace: Storage location for the new content. The list shows the collaborative spaces to which you are a member.
unifiedImport.options.organization.label: Organization
unifiedImport.options.organization.help: Business unit or department that will own the new content. The list shows the list of organizations to which you belong, and it is filtered based on your selection of collaborative space.
unifiedImport.widget.notHaveAccess: You do not have necessary credentials to access this widget.
unifiedImport.widget.notHaveAccess.noVPM: You do not have access to this widget. Try assigning Leader or Author role in the current collaborative space to gain access.
unifiedImport.notification.error.noMetho: Your content could not be imported
No suitable import method found for the selected content. Please check the file format and try again.
unifiedImport.notification.error.invalid: Your content could not be imported
The import method was unavailable. Contact your administrator for support.
unifiedImport.notification.error.content: Your content could not be imported
The selected content was disapproved by the import method.
unifiedImport.notification.success.proce: Your import {0} has been initiated. You   will be soon notified about its completion.
unifiedImport.notification.success.multi: Your import(s) of {0} file(s) have been submitted. You will be soon notified about the completion.
unifiedImport.notification.error.multiPr: {0} import(s) failed to be submitted. Please try resubmitting.
unifiedImport.notification.error.noImpor: None of the files could be submitted for Import. Please try resubmitting
unifiedImport.notification.error.timeout: Your content could not be uploaded.
The connection to the upload server might have timed out.
Verify your connection or reduce the amount of data being submitted during this operation.
unifiedImport.notification.error.checkin: Your content could not be uploaded
unifiedImport.notification.error.network: Wait a few minutes and try again.
unifiedImport.notification.error.maxFile: Your content could not be imported
The maximum allowed content size is 1GB.
unifiedImport.notification.error.driveIm: Drag and drop outside the local directory is not allowed.
unifiedImport.notification.error.maxNoOf: Your content could not be imported because the import method only allows a maximum of {0} files.
unifiedImport.notification.error.failure: Your content could not be imported
The content you have selected could not be analyzed
Please check the selected content and try again.
Failed to fetch details of the selected content
Please refresh the page and try again
unifiedImport.notification.error.unsuppo: No suitable import method found for the selected content. Please check the content and try again.
unifiedImport.notification.info.contentU: Your content was uploaded. Click on Import to begin.
unifiedImport.content.grid.tooltip.group: The file is excluded either because some corresponding content is missing or because it is redundant for the import method.
unifiedImport.content.grid.tooltip.Witho: The file is excluded because it is either redundant or not supported for this import.
unifiedImport.content.grid.tooltip.maxFi: The file is excluded because the import method only allows a maximum file size of {0}.
unifiedImport.content.grid.tooltip.inval: The file is excluded because it is not compatible with the import method.
unifiedImport.content.grid.tooltip.maxFi: The file is excluded because the import method only allows file names with a maximum length of {0} characters.
